Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Not that I'm against this patch, but have you considered allowing "lctl set_param ..." to allow configuring nodemap parameters instead of using the ioctl?

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1
> 
> Not that I'm against this patch, but have you considered allowing "lctl set_param ..." to allow configuring nodemap parameters instead of using the ioctl?

I think it would be better to have only one way to configure nodemaps, no?
Today, i.e. without dynamic nodemaps, the only way to set nodemap properties is to use 'lctl nodemap_*' commands, as 'lctl set_param' is not allowed for these (with 2 "minor" exceptions, sepol and fileset).

commit.subject: LU-17431 ptlrpc: move nodemap related ioctls to ptlrpc
commit.message:
LU-17431 ptlrpc: move nodemap related ioctls to ptlrpc

Move to ptlrpc the functions designed to handle nodemap specific
ioctls, as they should not be accessible to MGS only.
